global.title: CATL says sodium batteries are mainstream-ready, signs massive 60 GWh deal
global.summary: CATL, the world’s largest battery maker, signed a 60 GWh sodium-ion battery deal with energy storage integrator HyperStrong — the largest sodium-ion battery order ever placed. global.title: Oregon boosts EV road trips with 24 new fast-charging sites
global.summary: Oregon is getting ready to deploy another round of fast-charging stations along the highways, and it’s a meaningful step toward making EV road trips easier across the state. more…

global.title: EIA: 80 GW of new solar, wind + storage capacity coming in 2026

global.title: Here’s our first look at the Hyundai IONIQ 3 in real life [video]
global.summary: A week after its official debut, Hyundai’s electric hatchback was captured in public for the first time as a standard model. more…

global.title: Lectric e-bikes with up to $894 savings, Jackery 72-hour flash sale, EcoFlow 512Wh RIVER 2 Max power station $269 low, Aiper, more

global.title: BYD’s flagship electric SUV secures 30,000+ orders in 24 hrs, and its starts at under $40K
global.summary: The stunning three-row electric SUV can drive up to 590 miles (950 km) and is equipped with BYD’s new 5-minute Flash Charging. more…

global.title: Vacuum company shows concept rocket-boosted EV that does 0-60 in 0.9 sec
global.summary: Dreame, a Chinese company known for robot vacuums and other home appliances, is back with another electric supercar concept, this time with some actually unbelievable numbers. Try this one on for size: 0-62mph (0-100km/h) in 0.9 seconds. more…

global.title: Toyota’s EV sales rise 139% in March as drivers seek relief from surging gas prices
global.summary: As drivers look for alternatives amid rising gas prices, Toyota has been an unexpected winner, with EV sales more than doubling in March. more…

global.title: First drive: next-gen Xiaomi SU7 shows how fast Chinese EVs are improving
global.summary: I got behind the wheel of the next-generation Xiaomi SU7, and the upgrades are significant. The refreshed electric sedan delivers up to 902 km (560 miles) of CLTC range, 800V charging architecture across all trims, and standard LiDAR — all while still undercutting the Tesla Model 3 in China. global.title: Kia is slashing EV prices to keep pace with low-cost rivals
